category_sources: source_facts.description says somo is an alternative to netstat for socket and port monitoring; official README repeats this scope.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is somo; official GitHub repository and README use somo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage; docs.rs crate page mirrors the package documentation and README content.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/theopfr/somo; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify socket and port monitoring, Linux/macOS support, and CLI usage.
